title: thymus saturejoides subsp. pseudomastichina
intro: Thymus saturejoides subsp. pseudomastichina, also known as Thymus pseudomastichina, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its rich content of essential oils, particularly thymol, which has antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can aid in relieving respiratory issues, such as colds and bronchitis. Thymus saturejoides subsp. pseudomastichina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil for its medicinal and aromatic properties.
